item.name: Resolve a paytag into a payment intent or safe next action.

request.name: Resolve a paytag into a payment intent or safe next action.

description.content:
Sending apps submit a Cubid verified-stamp recipient, supported payment
paths, amount, purpose, and reconciliation reference. The response is a
resolved one-time MyPayTag intent, a hosted action, or a public safe
status.

item.name: Register supported receive routes for a receiving app.

request.name: Register supported receive routes for a receiving app.

description.content:
Receiving apps register route availability for a signed-in user.
Registration must not include wallet addresses, accounts, memos,
payment links, or chain-specific payment instructions.

item.name: Accept an MVP notification event payload.

request.name: Accept an MVP notification event payload.

description.content:
MVP notification delivery uses Cubid comms. The only MVP event is
payment_intent_created. Do not use payment-received language unless a
future provider receipt callback contract exists.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

MyPayTag lets sending apps resolve a user paytag into a one-time payment
intent, while receiving apps register supported routes and create dynamic
provider intents only after selection.

This public OpenAPI document describes integration-facing contracts only.
It does not expose private resolver storage, deployment wiring, audit
internals, admin APIs, service-role behavior, or provider credentials.


Contact Support:
 Name: MyPayTag
